2024-11-10T22:16:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to person in dangerous position , all lanes of Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road (Castle Peak bound) between Ho Pong Street and Yan Ching Street is closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.
2024-11-10T22:16:00.CONTENT_CN: 因有人在危險位置，屯門鄉事會路(往青山方向)介乎河傍街與仁政街之間的全線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-11-10T23:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to person in dangerous position , all lanes of Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road (Castle Peak bound) between Ho Pong Street and Yan Ching Street are closed to all traffic. Affected bus route K51 will not stop at ACME Shopping Arcade. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.
2024-11-10T23:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 因有人在危險位置，屯門鄉事會路(往青山方向)介乎河傍街與仁政街之間的全線現已封閉。 受影響巴⼠路線第K51號線將不停雅都商場。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-11-11T02:56:00.CONTENT_EN: All lanes of Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road (Castle Peak bound) between Ho Pong Street and Yan Ching Street which was closed due to person in dangerous position is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-11-11T02:56:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因有人在危險位置而封閉的屯門鄉事會路(往青山方向)介乎河傍街與仁政街之間的全線現已解封。

2024-11-10T22:24:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of the junction of Salisbury Road  and Nathan Road  are closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-11-10T22:24:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，梳士巴利道和彌敦道 交界的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-11-10T22:47:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of the junction of Salisbury Road  and Nathan Road  which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-11-10T22:47:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的梳士巴利道和彌敦道 交界的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-11-10T23:47:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , the fast lane of Lantau Link (Kap Shui Mun Bridge) (Kowloon bound) is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. The lower deck of Lantau Link (Kowloon bound) has been opened. Traffic is busy now.
2024-11-10T23:47:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，青嶼幹線(汲水門大橋)(往九龍方向) 的快線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 青嶼幹線下層(往九龍方向)現已開放。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-11-11T00:37:00.CONTENT_EN: The fast lane of Lantau Link (Kap Shui Mun Bridge) (Kowloon bound) which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-11-11T00:37:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的青嶼幹線(汲水門大橋)(往九龍方向) 的快線現已解封。

2024-11-11T08:24:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) near Siu Lam is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-11-11T08:24:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，屯門公路(往九龍方向)近小欖的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-11-11T08:33:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) near Siu Lam which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-11-11T08:33:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的屯門公路(往九龍方向)近小欖的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-11-11T08:48:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的龍翔道(往觀塘方向)近摩士公園游泳池的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-11-11T09:02:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Kwun Tong Bypass (Mong Kok bound) near Kwun Tong Ferry Pier is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-11-11T09:02:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，觀塘繞道(往旺角方向)近觀塘碼頭的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-11-11T09:14:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Kwun Tong Bypass (Mong Kok bound) near Kwun Tong Ferry Pier which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-11-11T09:14:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的觀塘繞道(往旺角方向)近觀塘碼頭的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-11-11T09:19:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Yuen Long Highway (Tuen Mun bound) near Fuk Hang Tsuen is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-11-11T09:19:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，元朗公路(往屯門方向)近福亨村的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-11-11T09:26:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Yuen Long Highway (Tuen Mun bound) near Fuk Hang Tsuen which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-11-11T09:26:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的元朗公路(往屯門方向)近福亨村的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-11-11T09:41:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Pok Fu Lam Road (Central bound) near Pokfield Road which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-11-11T09:41:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的薄扶林道(往中環方向)近蒲飛路的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-11-11T10:35:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to fallen tree , part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Tsuen Wan bound) near Tsing Tin Interchange is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-11-11T10:35:00.CONTENT_CN: 因塌樹，屯門公路(往荃灣方向)近青田交匯處的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-11-11T10:42:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to fallen tree , part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Tsuen Wan bound) near Tsing Tin Interchange is still being closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic queue on Tuen Mun Road (Tsuen Wan bound) ends at Yuen Long Highway (Tuen Mun bound) near Tan Kwai Tsuen.   Traffic is congested now.
2024-11-11T10:42:00.CONTENT_CN:
因塌樹，屯門公路(往荃灣方向)近青田交匯處的部份行車線仍然封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時在屯門公路(往荃灣方向)的車龍龍尾已到元朗公路(往屯門方向)近丹桂村。  現時上址交通擠塞。

2024-11-11T10:58:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Tsuen Wan bound) near Tsing Tin Interchange which was closed due to fallen tree is re-opened to all traffic. Traffic queue takes time to disperse.
2024-11-11T10:58:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因塌樹而封閉的屯門公路(往荃灣方向)近青田交匯處的部份行車線現已解封。 車龍有待消散。

2024-11-11T13:58:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle breakdown , the fast lane of Canal Road Flyover (Cross Harbour Tunnel bound) near Hennessy Road is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-11-11T13:58:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛故障，堅拿道天橋(往海底隧道方向)近軒尼詩道的快線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-11-11T14:04:00.CONTENT_EN: The fast lane of Canal Road Flyover (Cross Harbour Tunnel bound) near Hennessy Road which was closed due to vehicle breakdown is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-11-11T14:04:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因車輛故障而封閉的堅拿道天橋(往海底隧道方向)近軒尼詩道的快線現已解封。

2024-11-11T15:16:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Tsuen Wan bound) near Sham Tseng which was closed due to vehicle breakdown is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-11-11T15:16:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因車輛故障而封閉的屯門公路(往荃灣方向)近深井的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-11-11T15:37:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lung Fu Road (both bounds) near Lung Mun Oasis are closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-11-11T15:37:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，龍富路(來回方向)近龍門居的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-11-11T16:11:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , the slow lane of Tai Po Road - Sha Tin (Kowloon bound) near Wo Che Estate is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-11-11T16:11:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，大埔公路　–　沙田段(往九龍方向)近禾輋邨的慢線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。
